lines.speaker: Melana Moonlander
lines.text: Hi. Welcome to the general store. How might I help you?

lines.speaker: Melana Moonlander
lines.text: I said about magic of course. You know, in response to your question.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But I didn't ask anything yet.

lines.speaker: Melana Moonlander
lines.text: Yes, but you were thinking of asking me how I was floating.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How could you possibly know that?

lines.speaker: Melana Moonlander
lines.text: Don't you realise we can read your mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, of course. How do you manage to do that?

lines.speaker: Melana Moonlander
lines.text: It's quite simple, everyone has a resonance that is responded to by the moon. This resonance changes depending on what we are thinking. You can tune yourself in to listen to this resonance with practice - it's

lines.speaker: Melana Moonlander
lines.text: a life long quest for the members of the Moon Clan, but its especially easy to read with outsiders like yourself, as you are far louder and unguarded.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. I best be careful with what I think of then.
